title: oxalis sonderiana
intro: Oxalis sonderiana, also known as the Sonder's Wood Sorrel, is a species of flowering plant in the wood sorrel family (Oxalidaceae). The plant is native to South Africa and is known for its medicinal properties, which include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Oxalis sonderiana include its ability to help alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and support immune function. Oxalis sonderiana is traditionally prepared as a herbal infusion or tea, and it can also be found in capsule or tincture form for easier consumption.
